text.title: csharp-background-services Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for csharp-background-services as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Task.Run(async () => { while (true) { ... await Task.Delay(5000); } }) in Program.cs instead of BackgroundService.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bypasses IHost lifecycle, cancellation, DI scoping, and health check integration.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No back-pressure; producer can enqueue faster than the worker consumes, exhausting memory under load.

failure-mode.description: DbContext injected into BackgroundService constructor (captive dependency).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Singleton BackgroundService holds a scoped DbContext for the process lifetime, breaking EF Core's connection management.
